title: Lantern 3D - Better Lantern
description: 3D Lantern transforms Minecraft’s classic lantern into a beautiful 3D model, adding depth, detail, and realism to your builds!
body:
![3d lantern](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4a8d93ce21d519e6d04c9012f5d59594ea5de59d_0.webp)

✨ 3D Lantern transforms Minecraft’s classic lantern into a beautiful 3D model, adding depth, detail, and realism to your builds! Perfect for cozy homes, medieval villages, or modern interiors — light up your world in style! 💡🏠
 
Brighten your Minecraft world with 3D Lantern! 🏮
This texture pack replaces the standard lantern with a stunning 3D version, giving it a more realistic and polished appearance. Whether you hang it from ceilings or place it on the ground, your builds will shine with extra charm and beauty! 🌙✨
